title: tragus muricatus
intro: Tragus muricatus, also known as the Prickly Tragacanth or Prickly Cardoon, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, Tragus muricatus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tragus muricatus include treating gastrointestinal disorders, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. Tragus muricatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
